entities.description: A semi-arid region in Africa

entities.description: An arid region in India

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand drought stress

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of improving plant genetics for desired traits

entities.name: SHORT DURATION
entities.description: A characteristic of cultivars that mature quickly

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of an organism to change its development in response to the environment

entities.name: TILLERING ABILITY
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to produce side shoots

entities.name: MOLECULAR TOOLS
entities.description: Techniques used to analyze and manipulate DNA

entities.name: GENE MARKERS
entities.description: DNA sequences used to identify specific locations on a chromosome

entities.name: GENETIC MAPS
entities.description: A graphic representation of a chromosome showing the relative positions of genes and markers

entities.name: EST LIBRARIES
entities.description: Collections of expressed sequence tags representing transcribed genes

entities.name: BACS
entities.description: Bacterial artificial chromosomes used for genomic mapping

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with a particular phenotypic trait

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE INDEX
entities.description: An index reflecting genetic differences in drought adaptation

entities.name: FLOWERING TIME
entities.description: The time from germination to the onset of flowering

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum yield a genotype can achieve under optimal conditions

entities.name: PANICLE HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A trait relating to grain setting and filling capacity

entities.name: GRAIN SETTING
entities.description: The process of forming grains after pollination

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of a plant to fill grains with nutrients

entities.name: EMPIRICAL BREEDING
entities.description: Breeding based on observation and experience rather than molecular data

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing parents with desirable traits

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to introgress a specific trait

entities.name: LEAF CONDUCTANCE
entities.description: The measure of the rate of passage of water vapor through the leaf

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts

entities.name: VAPOR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much it can hold when saturated

entities.name: VEGETATIVE STAGE
entities.description: The period of plant growth before flowering

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING PERIOD
entities.description: The stage of plant development where grains are filled

entities.name: ROOT TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of the plant root system

entities.name: IDEOTYPES
entities.description: An ideal plant type designed for specific environments

entities.name: RAINFALL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Different types of precipitation patterns in a region
